mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ${table} (id, stage_id, drops, times, server, source, create_time, uid, version) VALUES
(#{item.id},#{item.stageId},#{item.drops},#{item.times}, #{item.server},#{item.source},#{item.createTime},#{item.uid},#{item.version})

INSERT INTO ${table} (id, stage_id, drops, times, server, source, create_time, uid, version) VALUES (#{item.id},#{item.stageId},#{item.drops},#{item.times}, #{item.server},#{item.source},#{item.createTime},#{item.uid},#{item.version})
mapper.select: SELECT t.stage_id AS stageId, t.item_id AS itemId, SUM(t.item_quantity) AS quantity, SUM(t.times) AS times FROM ( SELECT sd.stage_id, jt.item_id, jt.item_quantity, sd.times FROM ${tableName} sd LEFT JOIN JSON_TABLE( sd.drops, '$[*]' COLUMNS( item_id VARCHAR(50) PATH '$.itemId', item_quantity BIGINT PATH '$.quantity' ) ) AS jt ON TRUE WHERE sd.create_time >= #{start} AND sd.create_time < #{end} AND sd.server = 'CN' ) t GROUP BY t.stage_id, t.item_id
